## Environment metadata

Environment files are never copied. Only file names and key names are recorded:

- `.env.example` — keys: `KINWARD_ENVIRONMENT`, `KINWARD_API_PORT`, `KINWARD_DATABASE_URL`, `KINWARD_MEMORY_BACKEND`, `KINWARD_HONCHO_URL`, `KINWARD_KNOWLEDGE_BACKEND`, `KINWARD_LLM_WIKI_URL`, `KINWARD_HOME_ASSISTANT_URL`, `KINWARD_HOME_ASSISTANT_TOKEN`, `POSTGRES_DB`, `POSTGRES_USER`, `POSTGRES_PASSWORD`
